message:
test(frankenterm-core): add color interaction fixtures + fix new Action variant handling

Add 8 new VT conformance fixtures testing color interactions:
- scroll_preserves_colors: SGR colors survive DECSTBM region scroll
- save_restore_preserves_colors: DECSC/DECRC round-trips fg/bg colors
- ed_below_uses_current_bg: ED 0 uses current bg for erased cells
- el_left_uses_current_bg: EL 1 uses current bg for erased cells
- ech_uses_current_bg: ECH uses current bg for blanked chars
- insert_chars_uses_current_bg: ICH fills with current bg
- delete_chars_uses_current_bg: DCH fills vacated right positions with current bg
- full_reset_clears_cell_colors: RIS resets SGR colors to default

Fix non-exhaustive match arms in conformance_fixtures.rs and
proptest_invariants.rs for new Action variants (DeviceAttributes,
DeviceAttributesSecondary, DeviceStatusReport, CursorPositionReport,
DesignateCharset, SingleShift2, SingleShift3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
